title: Interpreting Contrastive Embeddings in Specific Domains with Fuzzy Rules

text:
Sentiment Analysis
5. Fuzzy Rule-based System Fig. 2: Proposed methodology to exploit CLIP features and sentiment analysis using a FRBC. 1. The collection of texts to
study. 2. We compute the CLIP embeddings for all texts. 3. We use the K-Means clustering algorithm to obtain the structures
formed in this space. 4. For each text, we extract the features of the sentiment analysis. 5. The FRBC: it takes as input for
each text the sentiment analysis features, using the fuzzy partitions as shown in Figure 1. Then, it uses the clusters detected
in Step 3 as targets. In this way, the FRBC maps our features of interest to the spacial regions where they were projected in
their embedding space.
